parameters.description: Send notifications to your own PagerDuty destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pagerduty:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native PagerDuty Events API v2 payload delivered straight to events.pagerduty.com.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"routing_key":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY }) *},"event_action":"trigger","payload":{"summary":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"source":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_SOURCE }) *},"severity":"error"}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment PagerDuty destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to PagerDuty Events API v2 (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's PagerDuty apikey

integrationkey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's PagerDuty integrationkey
